input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.5.3
            TITLE: the endurance event is complete when both:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.5.3: The Endurance Event is complete when both:
D.12.5.3 The Endurance Event is complete when both: 
• the team has completed the specified number of laps  
• the second driver crosses the finish line

final_answer: The Endurance Event is complete when both: • the team has completed the specified number of laps • the second driver crosses the finish line
